findings.title: S3 Public Access Block
findings.description: Bucket does not fully block public access — data is world-readable.
findings.remediation: Enable all four public access block settings on the bucket and account level.

findings.title: S3 Public Access Block
findings.description: Bucket does not fully block public access — data is world-readable.
findings.remediation: Enable all four public access block settings on the bucket and account level.

findings.title: S3 Default Encryption
findings.description: Bucket has no default encryption — objects stored in plaintext.
findings.remediation: Enable SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS default encryption on the bucket.

findings.title: S3 Default Encryption
findings.description: Bucket has no default encryption — objects stored in plaintext.
findings.remediation: Enable SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS default encryption on the bucket.

findings.title: Root Account MFA
findings.description: Root account has no MFA — full account takeover risk if credentials are exposed.
findings.remediation: Enable hardware or virtual MFA on the root account immediately.

findings.title: IAM User MFA
findings.description: User lab-admin has no MFA — account compromise possible with credentials alone.
findings.remediation: Enable virtual or hardware MFA for all IAM users with console access.

findings.title: IAM User MFA
findings.description: User vulnerable-user has no MFA — account compromise possible with credentials alone.
findings.remediation: Enable virtual or hardware MFA for all IAM users with console access.

findings.title: Access Key Rotation (90-day)
findings.description: Access key is 5 days old — exceeds 90-day rotation policy.
findings.remediation: Rotate access keys every 90 days. Automate with IAM credential reports.

findings.title: Access Key Rotation (90-day)
findings.description: Access key is 5 days old — exceeds 90-day rotation policy.
findings.remediation: Rotate access keys every 90 days. Automate with IAM credential reports.

findings.title: Access Key Rotation (90-day)
findings.description: Access key is 0 days old — exceeds 90-day rotation policy.
findings.remediation: Rotate access keys every 90 days. Automate with IAM credential reports.

findings.title: No Direct Admin Policy
findings.description: User lab-admin has AdministratorAccess directly attached — violates least privilege.
findings.remediation: Use IAM roles with least-privilege policies. Remove direct admin attachment.

findings.title: No Direct Admin Policy
findings.description: User vulnerable-user has AdministratorAccess directly attached — violates least privilege.
findings.remediation: Use IAM roles with least-privilege policies. Remove direct admin attachment.

findings.title: CloudTrail Actively Logging
findings.description: Trail lab-trail exists but logging is OFF — API calls are not recorded.
findings.remediation: Start logging on the trail immediately.

findings.title: SSH Not Open to World
findings.description: SG vulnerable-sg allows SSH from anywhere — brute force and credential attack exposure.
findings.remediation: Restrict port 22 to specific CIDRs or use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.

findings.title: SSH Not Open to World
findings.description: SG default allows SSH from anywhere — brute force and credential attack exposure.
findings.remediation: Restrict port 22 to specific CIDRs or use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.

findings.title: RDP Not Open to World
findings.description: SG vulnerable-sg allows RDP from anywhere — remote desktop attack surface exposed.
findings.remediation: Restrict port 3389 to specific CIDRs or use VPN/bastion host.

findings.title: RDP Not Open to World
findings.description: SG default allows RDP from anywhere — remote desktop attack surface exposed.
findings.remediation: Restrict port 3389 to specific CIDRs or use VPN/bastion host.

findings.title: EBS Volume Encryption
findings.description: Volume vol-0f55743c585520a08 stores data unencrypted — data at rest is readable if snapshot is shared.
findings.remediation: Enable EBS account-level default encryption or encrypt this volume.

findings.title: VPC Flow Logs Enabled
findings.description: VPC vpc-07c4ee874cd18e206 has no flow logs — network traffic is invisible for forensics.
findings.remediation: Enable VPC Flow Logs to CloudWatch Logs or S3.

findings.title: GuardDuty Enabled
findings.description: GuardDuty detector exists but is not enabled.
findings.remediation: Enable the GuardDuty detector.
